# TechSmog

> iOS app developer building educational and productivity apps for iPhone and iPad. Primary product: PermitReady — a free driver's permit practice test app for teens in 19 US states.

## PermitReady

PermitReady is a free iOS app that helps teens study for their driver's permit (learner's permit) exam. It covers 19 US states with state-specific practice questions based on official 2026 driver handbooks. The app includes practice quiz mode, timed test simulation, study-by-category, progress tracking, and offline access.

- Free with ads; optional $4.99 one-time purchase to remove ads
- No subscriptions
- Available on iPhone and iPad
- App Store: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/permitready-dmv-practice/id6763930311
